content:
Post 1

📉 Friday selloff hit the ASX 200 hard in pockets — index fell 44pts or 0.50% to 8,796.70. Materials cratered 2.91% while defensives held. The index is flat for the week and flat YTD. Two steps forward, two steps back. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

🔻 Materials worst sector at -2.91%, dragging the index. IT fell 1.60%. On the other side, Utilities +1.77%, Energy +1.66%, and Telcos +1.62% provided the floor. Classic risk-off rotation — defensives absorbing the blow. #ASX #mining #energy

Post 3

🟢 AMP the standout Friday — up 6.32% to AUD 2.02, the clear index leader. Woodside added 3.29% to AUD 30.46, bucking the broader energy narrative. Meanwhile 4DMedical collapsed 15.57% to AUD 3.20. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD 5,733.43/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6976. Silver AUD 80.10/oz. Platinum AUD 2,344.33/oz. Precious metals firm in AUD terms — a weaker local currency flattering returns even as Materials sector sold off. #gold #silver #commodities #ASX

Post 5

ASX 200 sits at 8,796.70 — flat for the week and flat YTD. Materials weakness is the key thread to watch. Does gold above AUD 5,700/oz hold next week, or does USD strength via AUD/USD 0.6976 cap the upside? Drop your call below. #ASX #gold #ausbiz
